Once again, you find yourself in a castle setting where the team must work together to complete trials and collect gold for a common prize pool. However, there is a traitor hiding among you, who is secretly carrying out his own tasks and in the shadows of the night may eliminate one of the innocent. Whether you share it or try to get it all for yourself is up to you. The supplementary set is designed for 4-6 players aged 12 years and older and requires the basic game to play. items.raw_desc: Uszony RIDEWAVE US box flosna:Universal replacement fin RIDEWAVE US box flosna is designed for paddleboards with US box system and is fully compatible with the Ridewave brand. This type of fin is fastened with a screw and plate, allowing fine adjustment of its position as needed - closer to the centre for better manoeuvrability, further away for a more stable ride. Thanks to its solid and contoured profile, it provides excellent directional guidance and stability, which is especially appreciated by riders on longer trips, touring routes or on calm water. It is made of durable plastic that can withstand normal wear and tear and minor impacts. The RIDEWAVE US box flosna has a black-green design.                     Key features of the RIDEWAVE US box finReplacement fin compatible with all Ridewave paddleboardsEasy and quick screw-on installationFor better stability and directional guidanceMade of durable materialIn black and greenThe RIDEWAVE US box flosna is suitable for recreational and sport riders

Tato kompaktní sada vám umožní připravit perfektní kávu, která si zachová plnou chuť a aroma. Sada obsahuje vše potřebné k uvaření dokonalé kávy. To vám umožní připravit kávu kdekoli a kdykoli. Spařovač má kapacitu 300 ml, což umožňuje připravit jeden nebo dva šálky aromatické kávy. Díky kompaktním rozměrům se snadno vejde do tašky nebo batohu. Byl navržen s ohledem na praktičnost a pohodlí při cestování. Hlavní výhodou tohoto sládka je jeho snadné použití. Jednoduše vložte filtry do filtrační nálevky, přidejte čerstvou kávu a horkou vodu a poté jemně stiskněte píst. Díky použití tlaku se z mleté kávy lisuje káva, která dodává intenzivní a bohatou chuť. items.raw_desc: Fazék Savanyító edény zöldségekhez 1,3 l PICKLES:        If you love pickled vegetables, prepare this popular delicacy yourself, from your own sources and in the right proportions and flavour for you. Chop suitable vegetables and add them together with spices or herbs to the prepared Orion PICKLES pot. Then cover the contents with the inner lid, close the pot with the outer lid and place a wooden skewer in the centre hole. Secure the attached rubber band behind the ears and then pull it over the shank. This will constantly put pressure on the inner lid and the vegetables inside. Thanks to the natural process of lactic fermentation, you will have a healthy snack or side dish ready within a few days. The 1.3 l PICKLES Orion vegetable pickling pot is made of ceramic and is dishwasher safe.
